restoreConfirmDescription: This overwrites all live content, users, and settings with what's in this backup, and immediately logs everyone out — including you. Everyone must log back in. Writes are temporarily disabled while the restore runs. This cannot be undone.
resyncTailLabel: Restore complete — rebuilding search index before reload
needsInterventionDescription: The restore could not finish cleanly and this instance may be left in a partially-restored state. Writes remain disabled until this is resolved. Restarting the server now re-loads whatever is actually on disk, which is the supported way back to a consistent state.
selfRestarting: Restarting server… this page will reload automatically in a few seconds.

toast.restoreAlreadyRunning: A restore is already in progress
toast.restoreSucceededResyncUnconfirmed: Restore completed, but couldn't confirm the search index finished rebuilding. Reloading — trigger a manual sync from Maintenance if search results look stale.

errors.jobLost: Restore job lost — server may have restarted
